200# return «

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚

Fighter type: Mage

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, Chronomage uses time magic on 3 random units: - If the ability was used on an ally, that unit is accelerated for 5 sec. An accelerated unit has increased attack speed by 10%, dodge by 15%, and crit by 15%. - If the ability was used on an enemy, that unit is slowed for 5 sec. A slowed unit has reduced attack speed by 10%, dodge by 15%, and crit by 15%.

description 4/6

Once in a while, Chronomage uses time magic on 3 random units: - If the ability was used on an ally, that unit is accelerated for 5 sec. An accelerated unit has increased attack speed by 25%, dodge by 30%, and crit by 30%. - If the ability was used on an enemy, that unit is slowed for 5 sec. A slowed unit has reduced attack speed by 30%, dodge by 30%, and crit by 30%. Once in a while, Chronomage suspends the enemy with the greatest damage in time for 4 sec. That enemy can’t attack, use abilities, take damage, or restore health. Chronomage deals 150000 magic damage to this target for 4 sec. The effect ends when the suspended enemy remains alone.

description 6/6

Once in a while, Chronomage uses time magic on 4 random units: - If the ability was used on an ally, that unit is accelerated for 5 sec. An accelerated unit has increased attack speed by 50%, dodge by 60%, and crit by 60%. - If the ability was used on an enemy, that unit is slowed for 5 sec. A slowed unit has reduced attack speed by 60%, dodge by 60%, and crit by 60%. Once in a while, Chronomage suspends the enemy with the greatest damage in time for 6 sec. That enemy can’t attack, use abilities, take damage, or restore health. Chronomage deals 300000 magic damage to this target for 6 sec. The effect ends when the suspended enemy remains alone. Once in a while, Chronomage sends 3 random allies back in time. They fully restore health, and their weapon, ring, amulet and totem ability cooldown time is reset. The amount of health restored from this ability can’t reduced by effects that reduce healing.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

When an accelerated allied fighter lands a critical hit, they deal additional damage equal to 150% of their attack.

description 4/6

When an accelerated allied fighter lands a critical hit, they deal additional damage equal to 150% of their attack. Magic damage received by a suspended in time enemy fighter becomes pure.

description 6/6

When an accelerated allied fighter lands a critical hit, they deal additional damage equal to 150% of their attack. Magic damage received by a suspended in time enemy fighter becomes pure. Attacks of returned back in time fighters ignore 40% armor of their targets for 5 sec.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

With a 60% chance, when any allied fighter dodges an attack, the Chronomage accelerates them. If an allied fighter has already been accelerated, stun sthe enemy fighter whose attack the allied fighter dodged for 2 sec.

description 4/6

With a 60% chance, when any allied fighter dodges an attack, the Chronomage accelerates them. If an allied fighter has already been accelerated, stun sthe enemy fighter whose attack the allied fighter dodged for 2 sec. When time begins to flow again for a suspended in time enemy fighter, his damage is reduced by 25% for 5 sec.

description 6/6

With a 60% chance, when any allied fighter dodges an attack, the Chronomage accelerates them. If an allied fighter has already been accelerated, stun sthe enemy fighter whose attack the allied fighter dodged for 2 sec. When time begins to flow again for a suspended in time enemy fighter, his damage is reduced by 25% for 5 sec. When Chronomage sends allied fighters back in time, Chronomage also resets the armor ability cooldown time of the returned fighters and all allies in a small radius around them to zero.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Slowed enemy fighters have their armor, weapon, and artifact ability cooldown times increased by 2 sec.

description 4/6

Slowed enemy fighters have their armor, weapon, and artifact ability cooldown times increased by 2 sec. The magic armor of a suspeded in time enemy fighter is reduced by 40%. After the effect ends, the magic armor remains reduced by 4 sec.

description 6/6

lowed enemy fighters have their armor, weapon, and artifact ability cooldown times increased by 2 sec. The magic armor of a suspeded in time enemy fighter is reduced by 40%. After the effect ends, the magic armor remains reduced by 4 sec. All allied fighters who have been sent back in time are removed from all negative effects.

Magic in a Bottle
